Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Continued To May-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving (1) Settlement Agreement; (2) Accounting; And (3) Resignation Of Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Everson for and with John Warda Jr. Lael Brown for Lavonne Joyce. Matthew Lucas for Diane Winter.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to this court having/not having jurisdiction to approve the settlement agreement, the mediation session being informal and not all Parties participating/attending, Mr. Warda's fees, the work relationship between Mr. Warda and Ms. Joyce, work performed by Mr. Warda, Mr. Warda not having time records, timeliness of Ms. Winter's objection, etc. The Court approved the settlement agreement and resignation of Mr. Warda. The issues of the accounting and fees are taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
